nodes.context: American street gang in St. Louis, Missouri, active early 20th century, involved in voter intimidation, armed robbery, assault, illegal lottery, and murder.
Larger, more powerful St. Louis gang, rivals of the Bottoms Gang.
Local mob in Soulard district that absorbed surviving Bottoms Gang members.
Evolved from the Chouteau Avenue Gang over time.
Splinter group of the Bottoms Gang known for fighting police.

edges.evidence_quote: The number-one enemy of the Bottoms Gang was the larger, more powerful Egan's Rats gang.
edges.context: The Bottoms Gang feuded with Egan's Rats, their primary rival.

edges.evidence_quote: A splinter group of the Bottoms Gang became known as the "Nixie Fighters" because of their penchant for fighting police officers.
edges.context: The Nixie Fighters were a splinter group that broke away from the Bottoms Gang.

edges.evidence_quote: A handful of the surviving members had relocated to the Soulard district where they fell in with a local mob known as the Chouteau Avenue Gang.
edges.context: Surviving Bottoms Gang members joined the Chouteau Avenue Gang after the Bottoms Gang dissolved.

edges.evidence_quote: Over the fullness of time, this crew would evolve into the Cuckoo Gang.
edges.context: The Chouteau Avenue Gang eventually evolved into the Cuckoo Gang.
